'''chashuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qibla|qibla]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qibla|qibla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chashuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshiyith|chæshiyith]] || [[word:chæshiyij|chæshiyij]] || [[word:chæshiyish|chæshiyish]] || [[word:chæshiyi|chæshiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashushuyuth|chashushuyuth]] || [[word:chashushuyuj|chashushuyuj]] || [[word:chashushuyush|chashushuyush]] || [[word:chashushuyu|chashushuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashuyuth|chashuyuth]] || [[word:chashuyuj|chashuyuj]] || [[word:chashuyush|chashuyush]] || [[word:chashuyu|chashuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashufyufth|chashufyufth]] || [[word:chashufyufj|chashufyufj]] || [[word:chashufyufsh|chashufyufsh]] || [[word:chashufyuf|chashufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashuyuthu|chashuyuthu]] || [[word:chashuyuju|chashuyuju]] || [[word:chashuyushu|chashuyushu]] || [[word:chashuyuku|chashuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashuyuth|chashuyuth]] || [[word:chashuyuj|chashuyuj]] || [[word:chashuyush|chashuyush]] || [[word:chashuyu|chashuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashuyuthul|chashuyuthul]] || [[word:chashuyujul|chashuyujul]] || [[word:chashuyushul|chashuyushul]] || [[word:chashuyukul|chashuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashuyuuthuthu|chashuyuuthuthu]] || [[word:chashuyuujuju|chashuyuujuju]] || [[word:chashuyuushushu|chashuyuushushu]] || [[word:chashuyuuku|chashuyuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashuyuthun|chashuyuthun]] || [[word:chashuyujun|chashuyujun]] || [[word:chashuyushun|chashuyushun]] || [[word:chashuyukun|chashuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashuyuthuoro|chashuyuthuoro]] || [[word:chashuyujuoro|chashuyujuoro]] || [[word:chashuyushuoro|chashuyushuoro]] || [[word:chashuyukuoro|chashuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
